name: Dusk Gradient
description: Deep purple to warm orange gradient background, Syne bold font. Sunset energy for lifestyle, creator, and personal brand content.

typography.note: Scene backgrounds: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a0533 0%, #6b1a5c 50%, #c0392b 80%, #ff6b35 100%). Each scene can shift the gradient angle slightly for variety. Accent elements can use either orange (#ff6b35) or yellow (#ffd166) — mix them across scenes for warmth.

css.capText: font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:34px; font-weight:400; color:#fff4e6; text-shadow:0 2px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.8); padding:0 140px; line-height:1.4;
